name: t0-trader
description: Script-output skill. MUST run scripts/final_t0.py --target <股票名或代码> for the manual T0 watch assistant, or scripts/final_t0.py --target <股票名或代码> --monitor --once for monitoring, and return stdout verbatim. Manual output must start with T0 盯盘助理 and include 当前结论、今日关键点、今日回顾、盘中走势、仓位建议、下一步只盯. Monitor mode only prints trigger/expired/blocked/invalidated alerts or nothing; observation-zone entry must stay silent. Never handwrite, summarize, shorten, restyle, translate, add markdown tables, add disclaimers, or claim an order was placed.
